title: Does This Fit?
description: Clothing vocabulary + sizes + fitting rooms. Plus the difference between FIT (size) and SUIT (look good).
summary_pt_br: Roupas + tamanhos + provador. FIT (caber — tamanho) vs SUIT (combinar — estilo). 'These jeans FIT me' (caibo neles). 'This color SUITS you' (essa cor te combina).

turns.en: Do you have this in a medium?
Yes. The fitting rooms are over there.
These jeans don't fit. They're too tight.
turns.pt: Essa calça não cabe. Tá apertada.

turns.en: The blue shirt really suits you, though.
turns.pt: Mas a camisa azul fica ótima em você.

scenes.title: FIT vs SUIT
scenes.body_en: FIT = the right SIZE. 'These pants fit me.' (they're my size). SUIT = looks good / matches YOU. 'That color suits you.' (looks nice on you). Brazilians mix these — don't.
scenes.body_pt: FIT = CABE (tamanho). SUIT = FICA BEM (aparência). 'These pants fit' (cabem). 'This color suits you' (combina com você).

examples.en: Small size fits. Red color suits.

exercise.question: 'That shirt really ___ you.' (looks good on you)
Complete: "Yes, a blue shirt in ___, please."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "Yes, a blue shirt in medium, please."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Onde é o provador?')
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Where is the fitting room?"

scenes.title: At the clothing store
scenes.pt_summary: Tamanhos e provadores — small, medium, large, fitting room.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome. Are you looking for something specific?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, a blue shirt in medium, please.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Here is a medium. Try it on.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Right behind you, on the left.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Would you like to try a large?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, please bring me a large.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Here you go. Does it fit better?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Wonderful. I will ring it up.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Does This Fit?". Clothing vocabulary + sizes + fitting rooms. Plus the difference between FIT (size) and SUIT (look good). Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Does This Fit?". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Does This Fit?'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Does This Fit?".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: Perfect English Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Regras de gramática + exercícios interativos gratuitos.

sources.label: British Council · A2
sources.pt_hint: Leituras A2 com exercícios de compreensão.
